text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on board helping keep our community safe and welcoming.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. We can't wait to see the awesome events you'll help organize for our members.
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to explore the channels, introduce yourself, and join the conversations.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Our members will greatly benefit from your experience and guidance. We're thrilled to have you join us.
